name: Baked Custard
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 cups of water to a temperature between 110°F and 115°F.
2. In a bowl, combine eggs, instant dry milk, vanilla extract, salt, and the dry sugar substitute until well mixed.
3. Gradually stir in hot water into the egg mixture, ensuring it is thoroughly blended.
4. Divide the mixture evenly among 4 custard cups.
5. Sprinkle each cup lightly with nutmeg if desired.
6. Place the custard cups in an 8-inch or 9-inch cake pan and pour boiling water around them to a depth of 1 1/2 inches.
7. Bake at 325°F for approximately 1 hour, or until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow to cool at room temperature before serving warm or chilled.
Food Exchange per Serving: 2/3 MILK EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
Nutrition Information: CHO: 8g; PRO: 9g; FAT: 5g; CAL: 101
